title: Policy thresholds
description: Runtime policy knobs for eligibility and subject entry thresholds.

max_chosen_a_levels.description: Normal maximum number of committed A-level choices for one student.

high_attainment_max_chosen_a_levels.description: Maximum committed A-level choices for a student whose average GCSE score meets the high-attainment threshold.

high_attainment_average_gcse.description: Average GCSE score at or above which the high-attainment choice cap applies.

max_green_choices.description: Optional, normally omitted. When set, caps the number of auto-enrol greens and demotes the lowest-weight surplus to amber. Omit to disable the cap so every green stays green.

advice_considers_unsat_gcses.description: Optional, off by default. When true the counterfactual advisor reverts to the old, heavier search that may propose sitting a brand-new GCSE; a diagnostic knob, not for normal operation.

advice_max_grade_cost.description: Maximum total GCSE grade increments the counterfactual advisor may propose per subject search.

advice_max_subjects_changed.description: Maximum distinct GCSE subjects the counterfactual advisor may change in one proposal bundle.

advice_max_pipeline_evaluations.description: Optional hard cap on full pipeline evaluations across one advise call; omit for unlimited.
